title: Kirjasto muistuttaa maksamattomista maksuista 13.4.2026
content:
The library reminds about unpaid fees on 13 April, 2026

vihanto@helsinki.fi Mon, 13/04/2026 - 09:49
The library sends a reminder of unpaid fees to prevent them from expiring. Payments can be made during your next visit to the library or online by logging in to Helka.

On Monday, 13 April, the library will send a reminder to all Helka customers who have outstanding overdue fines. The debt expires in three years unless a reminder is sent.&nb

title: Reija Kronberg will defend her PhD thesis
content:
Reija Kronberg will defend her PhD thesis

mkulmala@helsinki.fi Mon, 13/04/2026 - 09:32

Reija Kronberg will defend her PhD thesis on April 17, 12.00, about “Impact of seasonal waterlogging on organic carbon dynamics in cultivated boreal mineral soils".

The opponent is Professor Carsten Müller (Institute for Ecology, Technical University Berlin, Germany), and the custos is Professor Mari Pihlatie. 

Examination is organized in EE-building, Walter hall (Agnes Sjöbergin katu 2, Helsinki).

creator: mkulmala@helsinki.fi

johanemi@helsinki.fi Wed, 07/01/2026 - 08:40
The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

The renovation will start with the construction of temporary traffic arrangements from Wednesday 7 January onwards. The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

title: Shanshan Zhang väittelee aiheesta Epävarmuuden ymmärtäminen mentaalisessa päättelyssä
content:
Shanshan Zhang defends her PhD thesis on Understanding Uncertainty in Mental Inference with Bayesian Computational Rationality

ronkaine@helsinki.fi Mon, 13/04/2026 - 10:48
On Friday the 24th of April 2026, M.Eng. Shanshan Zhang defends her PhD thesis on Understanding Uncertainty in Mental Inference with Bayesian Computational Rationality. The thesis is related to research done in the Department of Computer Science (UH) and the Faculty of Information Technology (JyU).
